creator: pat@patmaddox.com
text:
Thanks for the info.

It is pretty confusing (and disappointing) to learn that it doesn’t work. Mostly because, after learning to decipher AMD’s goofy code names, I was finally able to buy a card with a code name that appeared in the amd firmware package.

It’s really not clear to me which ones are supported and which aren’t. I’ve spent a couple dozen hours at least reading through source code, articles about Linux 5.10, etc. So I don’t think I’ve been lazy - but maybe there is some obvious documentation that I completely overlooked.

In any case, I am going to try my luck with an nvidia card. They appear to be clear on exactly which products they support (unlike AMD, whose branding and code names are absolute madness.. and that’s before you even get into porting it to FreeBSD).
